label: Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers

node.label: Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers
node.definition: Numerical solvers are embedded in trainable computation graphs so physical or latent dynamics can be learned end to end.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers is modeled as depending on Numerical analysis, Differential equations and feeding downstream nodes such as Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models, Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs.
examples: atlas downstream link to Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models
atlas downstream link to Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs
atlas downstream link to Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Numerical analysis, Differential equations.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers has a `uses` dependency on Numerical analysis because Numerical analysis is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers has a `uses` dependency on Differential equations because Differential equations is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers has a `uses` dependency on Calculus & automatic differentiation theory because Calculus & automatic differentiation theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
